mapper.sql: select menu_id, menu_name, parent_id, order_num, path, component, null as `query`, is_frame, is_cache, menu_type, visible, status, ifnull(perms, '') as perms, icon, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, remark, delete_by, delete_time from sb_menu
mapper.select: select distinct m.menu_id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.path, m.component, null as `query`, m.visible, m.status, ifnull(m.perms, '') as perms, m.is_frame, m.is_cache, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.order_num, m.create_time, m.update_time, m.create_by, m.update_by, m.remark, m.delete_by, m.delete_time from sb_menu m where m.menu_type in ('M', 'C') and m.status = '0' order by m.parent_id, m.order_num

select distinct m.menu_id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.path, m.component, null as `query`, m.visible, m.status, ifnull(m.perms, '') as perms, m.is_frame, m.is_cache, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.order_num, m.create_time, m.update_time, m.create_by, m.update_by, m.remark, m.delete_by, m.delete_time from sb_menu m where m.menu_type in ('M', 'C') and m.status = '0' and exists ( select 1 from sb_role_menu rm inner join sb_user_role ur on rm.role_id = ur.role_id inner join sb_role r on ur.role_id = r.role_id where rm.menu_id = m.menu_id and ur.user_id = #{userId} and r.status = '0' ) and ( exists (select 1 from sys_user u where u.user_id = #{userId} and u.customer_id is null) or exists ( select 1 from sys_user u inner join sb_customer_menu cm on cm.customer_id = u.customer_id and cm.menu_id = m.menu_id and (cm.delete_time is null) where u.user_id = #{userId} ) ) order by m.parent_id, m.order_num
mapper.insert: insert into sb_menu( menu_id, parent_id, menu_name, order_num, path, component, is_frame, is_cache, menu_type, visible, status, perms, icon, remark, create_by, create_time ) values( #{menuId}, #{parentId}, #{menuName}, #{orderNum}, #{path}, #{component}, #{isFrame}, #{isCache}, #{menuType}, #{visible}, #{status}, #{perms}, #{icon}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.select: select distinct m.perms from sb_menu m where m.status = '0' and m.perms is not null and m.perms != '' and exists ( select 1 from sb_role_menu rm inner join sb_user_role ur on rm.role_id = ur.role_id inner join sb_role r on ur.role_id = r.role_id where rm.menu_id = m.menu_id and ur.user_id = #{userId} and r.status = '0' )
